basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.short_information: NIT Trichy is recruiting a highly motivated candidate for research in power electronics, specifically reconfigurable bidirectional DC-DC converters for EV and DC microgrid applications.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be intimated to shortlisted candidates (Offline)

age_limit.details: Maximum 32 years as on the closing date (relaxation as per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC).

qualification.details: Candidates must have a strong academic record in Electrical/Electronics Engineering. The detailed eligibility is as follows: | For Junior Research Fellow (JRF): | B.E/B.Tech with First Class (minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA) in Electrical Engineering (EE) / Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) / Electrical and Computers Engineering / Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) with a valid GATE score. Preference: M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics / Power Electronics and Drives or equivalent (First Class i.e. 60% or 6.5 CGPA) from a recognized University/Institute. | For Project Associate – I: | B.E/B.Tech with First Class (minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA) in Electrical Engineering (EE) / Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) / Electrical and Computers Engineering / Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE). Preference: M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics / Power Electronics and Drives or equivalent Master’s degree (First Class i.e. 60% or 6.5 CGPA) from a recognized University/Institute. | Additional Notes on Eligibility: | For JRF, the GATE paper and subject of the qualifying degree must be related to the project discipline. Candidates should have strong fundamentals in power electronics, converter design, modulation strategies, simulation tools (MATLAB/Simulink, etc.), and hardware prototyping. Prior research experience in bidirectional DC-DC converters, Dual Active Bridge (DAB) topologies, or related areas will be an added advantage. Good communication skills, ability to work in a team, and enthusiasm for hardware development and publication are highly expected.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and documents. Shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. Original documents will be verified at the time of interview.
how_to_apply: Send scanned copy of application along with supporting documents as a single PDF to [email protected] and [email protected].
Also fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/r2Y4r2sLGiCz26Zb6
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals can apply. Incomplete applications will be rejected. Candidates must produce original documents at the time of interview. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: NIT TrichyRecruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Trichy is recruiting a highly motivated candidate for research in power electronics, specifically reconfigurable bidirectional DC-DC converters for EV and DC microgrid applications.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_nit_tir: Design and Development of High-Performance Reconfigurable Bidirectional DC-DC Converter...

rows.date: Will be intimated to shortlisted candidates (Offline)

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must have a strong academic record in Electrical/Electronics Engineering. The detailed eligibility is as follows: For Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E/B.Tech with First Class (minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA) in Electrical Engineering (EE) / Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) / Electrical and Computers Engineering / Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) with a valid GATE score. Preference: M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics / Power Electronics and Drives or equivalent (First Class i.e. 60% or 6.5 CGPA) from a recognized University/Institute. For Project Associate – I: B.E/B.Tech with First Class (minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA) in Electrical Engineering (EE) / Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) / Electrical and Computers Engineering / Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE). Preference: M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics / Power Electronics and Drives or equivalent Master’s degree (First Class i.e. 60% or 6.5 CGPA) from a recognized University/Institute. Additional Notes on Eligibility: For JRF, the GATE paper and subject of the qualifying degree must be related to the project discipline. Candidates should have strong fundamentals in power electronics, converter design, modulation strategies, simulation tools (MATLAB/Simulink, etc.), and hardware prototyping. Prior research experience in bidirectional DC-DC converters, Dual Active Bridge (DAB) topologies, or related areas will be an added advantage. Good communication skills, ability to work in a team, and enthusiasm for hardware development and publication are highly expected.

content_sections.heading: NIT TrichyRecruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum 32 years as on the closing date (relaxation as per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC).

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on application and documents. Shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. Original documents will be verified at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT TrichyJRF Position
content_sections.text: Fill the prescribed application format (Form 8). Send scanned copy of application along with supporting documents as a single PDF to [email protected] and [email protected] . Also fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/r2Y4r2sLGiCz26Zb6 Deadline: 07 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Trichy Candidates
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals can apply. Incomplete applications will be rejected. Candidates must produce original documents at the time of interview. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy JRF/Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: 07 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for JRF at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: ₹37,000 + HRA (for GATE qualified candidates) in the first two years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the project title for NIT Trichy JRF position?
faq.answer: Design and Development of High-Performance Reconfigurable Bidirectional DC-DC Converter with Advanced Modulation Strategy...

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for NIT Trichy JRF?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electronics Engineering with valid GATE score. M.Tech in Power Electronics is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE score mandatory for NIT Trichy Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: No, but GATE qualified candidates get higher emoluments under JRF category.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the NIT Trichy research project position?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF post?
faq.answer: Submit application via email to [email protected] and [email protected] along with Google Form.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for NIT Trichy JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 32 years (relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q9. Will selected candidates get PhD opportunity at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: Yes, opportunity to register for Ph.D. subject to fulfilment of institute norms.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job location for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Staff?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.
